rationale: Expand grammar to cover deep dicts, lists, remote sources, and confirm prompts

updates.replacement:
template_source
    : '"local"'
    | STRING_LITERAL   // e.g. "git+https://example.com/repo.git" or a zip URL
    ;

prompts_object
    : '{}'
    | '{' prompt_entry (',' prompt_entry)* '}'
    ;

prompt_entry
    : '"project_name"' ':' '"Project name?"'
    | '"use_docker"' ':' '"Use Docker?"'
    | '"license"' ':' '"Choose a license"'
    | '"database"' ':' '"Database settings"'
    | '"confirm_use_docker"' ':' '"[yes/no]"'   // confirm‑style prompt
    ;

nested_json_object
    : '{' json_pair (',' json_pair)* '}'
    ;

json_pair
    : STRING_LITERAL ':' json_value
    ;

json_value
    : STRING_LITERAL
    | NUMBER_LITERAL
    | json_bool
    | list_literal
    | nested_json_object
    ;
